_info.name: VoiceKit MCP — Audio Analysis Server
_info.description: Audio analysis MCP server from MCP's 1st Birthday hackathon. Tools: transcribe speech, isolate voices, compare voice embeddings, extract acoustic features. Deployed as a Gradio Space with SSE MCP endpoint.

voicekit.description: VoiceKit — transcribe audio, isolate voices, compare speakers, extract acoustic features via MCP
